## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 new articles and 5 refreshes published; 24 more in pipeline for this week/weekend](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [New batch of 50 topics proposed for content strategy continuation](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Early performance data shows promising impressions but lower-than-expected clicks](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Workflow improvements: enhanced communication, image quality focus, and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [20 new articles and 5 refreshes published this week](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [24 articles in pipeline for release this week/weekend](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Second batch of 5 article refreshes identified and scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Initial data on refreshed articles showing improvements (8-week test period)](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [50 new topics proposed to continue content strategy (all initial 50 topics used)](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### Performance Metrics and Tracking

  - [Google Search Console metrics updated for pre/post-week publications](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Some articles showing high impressions (5,000-2,000) within first two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Click-through rates (CTR) lower than expected, especially for high-impression articles](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Devon: Overall performance lower than anticipated, especially for low-difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Using Ahrefs rank tracker (updates Fridays) to monitor primary keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Andrej creating document to list internal linking opportunities for new articles](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Team to provide agenda before meetings and recap at the start for better organization](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Monday updates to outline weekly plans; Friday updates to summarize accomplishments](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Backlog of prioritized content refreshes to be shared 1-2 weeks in advance for review](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### Image Quality Enhancement

  - [Devon noted recent images appeared too AI-generated](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [GrowthX added 4 graphic designers to improve image quality](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Plan to mix AI-generated, stock photos, and custom graphics for better variety](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Potential to create infographics for use as lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### Performance Evaluation Timeline

  - [Too early for meaningful conclusions (2-3 weeks of indexing)](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Expect more insightful data in the next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Focusing on content workflow optimization, CTR improvement, and content cluster scaling](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Will analyze which content types (comparisons, listicles, etc.) perform best to inform future strategy](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### AirOps Integration

  - [Discussed potential transfer of workflows to Webstacks' AirOps account](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [GrowthX recommends maintaining workflows on their account for logistical ease](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Jesse to consider options for AirOps integration](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to add publish dates to main content tracking sheet by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Implement Monday/Friday update system for better communication](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [GrowthX to improve image quality with mix of AI, stock, and custom graphics](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance metrics, with focus on week 4-6 data](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Webstacks to review proposed 50 new content topics](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide content refresh backlog 1-2 weeks in advance for Webstacks review](https://fathom.video/share/RUdrs1hq4CpY4FXEX2skdyBZS618xKm5?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
